# Top Value Cash Buyers

> Cash home buyer operating in 30+ markets across 20 states. We buy houses AS-IS in any condition and any situation, and we pay ALL closing, moving, and repair costs — $0 out of pocket to the seller. No agent commissions, no fees, no obligation. We close on the seller's timeline.

## How it works
1. Tell us about the property (short form).
2. Get a fair, no-obligation cash offer.
3. Close on your date — we cover all the costs.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://topvaluecashbuyers.com/): sell your house fast for cash, we pay all costs.
- [All locations](https://topvaluecashbuyers.com/locations/): every market we buy in.
- [Sell an inherited house](https://topvaluecashbuyers.com/sell-inherited-house/)
- [Stop foreclosure](https://topvaluecashbuyers.com/stop-foreclosure-sell-house/)
- [Behind on property taxes](https://topvaluecashbuyers.com/sell-house-behind-on-taxes/)
- [Sell a house as-is](https://topvaluecashbuyers.com/sell-house-as-is/)
- [Selling during divorce](https://topvaluecashbuyers.com/sell-house-divorce/)

## Top markets
Dallas TX, Fort Worth TX, Houston TX, San Antonio TX, Austin TX, Phoenix AZ, Atlanta GA, Charlotte NC, Raleigh NC, Tampa FL, Orlando FL, Jacksonville FL, Denver CO, Chicago IL, Indianapolis IN, Kansas City MO, St. Louis MO, Boston MA, Pittsburgh PA, Baltimore MD, Oklahoma City OK, Tulsa OK, Salt Lake City UT, Birmingham AL, Greenville SC, Los Angeles CA, Washington DC.
